channel.title: Tech Blog
channel.description: Cutting-edge insights into technology, AI, and development

item.title: Tune small or prompt big: 2026 costs revealed
item.description: Fine-tune a 2.7B model and cut costs 78 % — but lose 31 % accuracy. Prompt a 70B model and pay $0.11 extra per 1k requests — but gain 26 % safety accuracy and beat SLA latency. 2026 real numbers included.

item.title: Handle Starlink 4G fallbacks in FastAPI 0.115
item.description: Cut 504 errors 68% with FastAPI 0.115 retries and Redis 7.2 caching under 400 ms Starlink latency — connection pool, stampede guard, and cache stampede mistake most teams make.

item.title: AI prompt injection: the attack you’re running live
item.description: Prevent AI data leaks in 2026 with real sanitizers and tests. Stop 29% of prompt injection attacks before they reach production — benchmarks, code, and the mistakes I made.

item.title: AI agents: the hidden $12k/agent tax
item.description: Cut AI agent costs 38% by auditing retries and timeouts — real 2026 metrics, token inflation, and the breaker mistake most teams miss.

item.title: Post-mortem: IaC tools after HashiCorp fork
item.description: Cut registry latency 75% with OpenTofu in 2026. Compare Pulumi vs Terraform vs OpenTofu after HashiCorp fork with registry benchmarks, memory usage, and provider parity numbers.

item.title: 5 AI tools that let us ship faster than SF teams
item.description: Cut dev cost 35% with AI — Amazon Q, Copilot Chat, Cursor, Codeium, GitLab Duo ranked by Nairobi benchmarks. Real latency and rollback stats inside.

item.title: 7 experiment platforms that replaced our flag system
item.description: Cut experiment setup time 70% with PostHog 1.43 — offline support, real-time analytics, and self-hosting under $20/month for 50k users

item.title: 6 weeks to SaaS: 80% code AI-built
item.description: Cut dev time 80%: 6-week SaaS built with AI tools for 82% of the code — Vercel, Supabase, FastAPI, and Cursor in 2026.

item.title: Schema-per-tenant cost us weeks. Here’s what worked
item.description: Cut PostgreSQL costs 60% and latency 82% by switching from schema-per-tenant to database-per-tenant with tenant grouping — the real numbers and Terraform code most tutorials skip.

item.title: AI UI tools broke my React flow — here’s why
item.description: Cut frontend component delivery 75% with AI UI tools — but expect to refactor 60% for accessibility, responsive design, and state integration. Real benchmarks, prompts, and CI setups from a 2026 production team.

item.title: Shrink multi-region costs 40%: the real levers
item.description: The docs never mention that every extra region adds 20–30 % to your cloud bill even if you leave the database idle.

item.title: AI-native apps break when you copy old rules
item.description: Cut AI API latency 60% by ditching REST endpoints. Token budgeting, prompt hashing, and task queues now matter more than CPU. Real systems show the wins.

item.title: AI ops showdown: automated runbooks vs. manual
item.description: AI ops vs manual runbooks: 25% cloud savings, 40% faster MTTR — the real numbers from 2026 and which tool to pick first

item.title: Pick SaaS niches AI can't erode
item.description: Cut SaaS churn 50% by picking niches AI can't erode — regulatory complexity, data scarcity, and trust asymmetry give you defensibility in 2026

item.title: LLM apps: OWASP’s 10 new attack paths
item.description: Reduce prompt injection losses 95% with OWASP Top 10 guardrails for LLM apps — concrete latency, cost, and incident data from 2026 deployments.

item.title: Debug Nairobi SaaS infra costs 2026
item.description: Nairobi SaaS 2026 cost: $1,104/month at 2.1k DAU — real breakdown with Terraform, FastAPI, Redis, and Cloudflare. Includes latency SLA and NAT savings.

item.title: Frontend tests 2026: Playwright won, Cypress lost
item.description: Cut frontend test time 77% and flake rate 86% with Vitest 1.6 + Playwright 1.44 — real CI costs, setup commands, and the Cypress migration trap most teams miss.

item.title: Claude Code in 2026: one year of lessons learned
item.description: Claude Code 2026 saves 39% PR review time but silently fails audits unless you capture agent events — here’s the 120-line shim we built and the real numbers after 90 days of use.

item.title: Trim $18k AWS bills: 2026 levers mid-size teams miss
item.description: Cut AWS costs 48% with Savings Plans and right-sizing in 2026 — the levers mid-size teams actually need, with benchmarks, Terraform snippets, and the checkpointing mistake most teams still make.

item.title: Daraja 2.0: 60-minute migration checklist
item.description: Cut Daraja 2026 migration time 70% — new OAuth2 flow, HTTPS-only callbacks, and the TLS 1.3 surprise most teams miss.
